---
title: "Sleep_Survey_2"
author: "zach"
date: "2025-11-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r load and run}
# Load required libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)

# Set up variables
data_directory <- "C:\\Users\\zzegu\\Downloads"
file_name <- "asbq_FB_Fall 2025.csv"
input_path <- file.path(data_directory, file_name)

# Load data
sleep_Pull_Data <- read.csv(input_path)

# Data transformations
sleep_Pull_Data2 <- sleep_Pull_Data %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date, "%m/%d/%Y")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Sport = `What.sport.do.you.play.`,
                Class = `What.is.your.current.status.at.UT.`) %>%
  ungroup()

sleepsvy <- clean_names(sleep_Pull_Data2)

sleepsvy1 <- sleepsvy %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c("i_take_afternoon_naps_lasting_two_or_more_hours":"travel_gets_in_the_way_of_building_a_consistent_sleep_wake_routine"), ~ as.factor(.x)))

sleepsvy2 <- sleepsvy1 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c("i_take_afternoon_naps_lasting_two_or_more_hours":"travel_gets_in_the_way_of_building_a_consistent_sleep_wake_routine"), factor, levels = c("Never", "Rarely", "Sometimes", "Frequently", "Always")))

sleepsvy_df <- sleepsvy2 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c("i_take_afternoon_naps_lasting_two_or_more_hours":"travel_gets_in_the_way_of_building_a_consistent_sleep_wake_routine"), ~ as.numeric(.x)))

sleepsvy2 <- sleepsvy2 %>%
  mutate(Season = case_when(
    format(date, "%m") %in% c("07", "08") ~ "Pre-Season",
    format(date, "%m") == "10" ~ "Mid-Season",
    TRUE ~ "Other"  # Optional, to capture other months if needed
  )) 
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:


```{r sleep_behavior_analysis}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Put Season in correct order once
sleepsvy2 <- sleepsvy2 %>%
  mutate(Season = factor(Season, levels = c("Pre-Season", "Mid-Season")))

# ============================
# LIST VARIABLES TO ANALYZE
# ============================
vars <- c(
  "i_take_afternoon_naps_lasting_two_or_more_hours",
  "i_use_stimulants_when_i_train_compete_e_g_caffeine",
  "i_exercise_train_or_compete_late_at_night_after_7pm",
  "i_consume_alcohol_within_4_hours_of_going_to_bed",
  "i_go_to_bed_at_different_times_each_night_more_than_1_hour_variation",
  "i_go_to_bed_feeling_thirsty",
  "i_go_to_bed_with_sore_muscles",
  "i_use_light_emitting_technology_in_the_hour_leading_up_to_bedtime_e_g_laptop_phone_television_video_games",
  "i_think_plan_and_worry_about_my_sporting_performance_when_i_am_in_bed",
  "i_think_plan_and_worry_about_issues_not_related_to_my_sport_when_i_am_in_bed",
  "i_use_sleeping_pills_tablets_to_help_me_sleep",
  "i_wake_to_go_to_the_bathroom_more_than_once_per_night",
  "i_wake_myself_and_or_my_bed_partner_with_my_snoring",
  "i_wake_myself_and_or_my_bed_partner_with_my_muscle_twitching",
  "i_get_up_at_different_times_each_morning_more_than_1_hour_variation",
  "at_home_i_sleep_in_a_less_than_ideal_environment_e_g_too_light_too_noisy_uncomfortable_bed_pillow_too_hot_cold",
  "i_sleep_in_foreign_environments_e_g_hotel_rooms",
  "travel_gets_in_the_way_of_building_a_consistent_sleep_wake_routine"
  
)

# Likert order (assumed same for all)
likert_levels <- c("Never", "Rarely", "Sometimes", "Frequently", "Always")

# ============================
# LOOP THROUGH VARIABLES
# ============================
for (v in vars) {
  
  cat("\n=====================================\n")
  cat("Variable:", v, "\n")
  cat("=====================================\n")
  
  # ---- Plot ----
  p <- ggplot(sleepsvy2, aes_string(x = v, fill = "Season")) +
    geom_bar(position = "dodge") +
    facet_wrap(~sport, ncol = 3) +
    labs(title = paste0("Distribution of ", v, " by Season and Sport"),
         x = v, y = "Count", fill = "Season") +
    theme_minimal()
  print(p)
  
  # ---- Convert Likert → numeric ----
  sleepsvy3 <- sleepsvy2 %>%
    mutate(
      !!v := factor(.data[[v]], levels = likert_levels, ordered = TRUE),
      !!v := as.numeric(.data[[v]])
    )
  
  # ---- Mann-Whitney ----
  mw <- wilcox.test(as.formula(paste(v, "~ Season")), 
                    data = sleepsvy3, exact = FALSE)
  
  # ---- Chi-square ----
  tbl <- table(sleepsvy2$Season, sleepsvy3[[v]])
  chi <- chisq.test(tbl)
  
  # ---- Print results ----
  cat("\nMann-Whitney U Test:\n")
  cat("Statistic:", mw$statistic, "\n")
  cat("P-value:", mw$p.value, "\n")
  
  cat("\nChi-square Test:\n")
  cat("Statistic:", chi$statistic, "\n")
  cat("P-value:", chi$p.value, "\n\n")
}


```
